client.name: DreamersJoy Floral Studio
client.tagline: Refined Floral Design for Intimate Gatherings

brand.coreEnergy: Quiet confidence. Contained joy. Refined, intentional creativity.
brand.idealClient: Affluent women in Wyckoff, Franklin Lakes, Ridgewood, and surrounding Bergen County towns who value aesthetics and prefer intimate experiences

floralStyle.aesthetic: Elevated, editorial but organic, intentional negative space, textural sculptural movement, understated luxury

logo.style: Circular stamp with serif D center, DREAMERSJOY arched top, FLORAL STUDIO arched bottom, two decorative dots

content.headline: Refined Floral Design for Intimate Gatherings
content.subheadline: Boutique workshops, curated installations & editorial floral artistry in Bergen County, NJ
content.aboutText: DreamersJoy Floral Studio is a boutique floral design studio built around intention, creative expression, and intimate scale. We create florals that feel refined, romantic, intentional, and elevated but approachable. Founded by Sarah De Jesus in Wyckoff, New Jersey, our studio focuses on seasonal workshops, private floral gatherings, and design-forward drop-off arrangements for discerning clients across Bergen County.
content.workshopText: Intimate gatherings of 10-14 guests in our curated home studio. Wine, music, elevated stems, and guided instruction in sculptural floral composition. Each seasonal session features premium stems like ranunculus, hellebores, and French tulips. Every guest leaves with an editorial-quality arrangement and professional photographs.
content.privateText: Birthday floral nights, mom's night out, corporate creative sessions, and client appreciation events. We provide flowers, tools, guidance, and a beautiful aesthetic setup. Design, deliver, elevate.
content.dropoffText: Dinner party florals, open house styling, holiday centerpieces, and custom bouquet orders. Our drop-off model means we design, deliver, and leave — no on-site event management required.
